author: codex

patch.value: Security, dependency, correctness, and governance remediation

Coordinated remediation tranche covering the current GitHub dependency-alert backlog, stale dependency PRs, session-output correctness issue #23, workflow modernization, deeper repository audit findings, and end-to-end release proof.

All current Dependabot alerts are closed by patched dependency resolutions.; Issue #23 has regression tests and correct human/machine-readable output.; Repository checks, package smoke tests, and GitHub checks pass on the pushed head.

message: Start broad remediation epic after all-status duplicate check returned zero local items
